name: Ingress Industrial (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Ingress Industrial (Thailand) Public Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the manufacture and distribution of automotive components in Thailand, Malaysia, Indonesia, and India. The company offers roll forming products, such as door sashes, glass guides, bellows, and EGR and collapsible pipes, as well as beltline, roof drip, and windshield; stamping products, including module assembly, side structures, under body, heat protector, brake plates, door hinges, and other products; and tool making and automation solutions. It also provides engineering and automatic production system design services. The company was incoporated in 2014 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand. Ingress Industrial (Thailand) Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Ingress Corporation Berhad.
